name: Centennial Park
description: Centennial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pearland, TX. There are 3 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Jasmine Park
description: Jasmine Park is a place to play pickleball in Lake Jackson, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Lake Jackson Recreation Center
description: Pickleball Courts set up in Recreation Center gymnasium during open play times only. For open play times and days call Lake Jackson Recreation Center 979-297-4533.
open_play_schedule: Open play and players must rotate and share courts

name: Pearland Recreation Center & Natatorium
description: Pearland Recreation Center & Natatorium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pearland, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights. You can reserve the courts.

name: Skylar Sun Sports
description: Skylar Sun Sports is a place to play pickleball in Pearland, TX. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.

name: Upside Sports Plex
description: Upside Sports Plex is a place to play pickleball in Alvin, TX. There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Vic Coppinger Family YMCA
description: Vic Coppinger Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Pearland, TX. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
